name: Glima AI
description: Glima AI is an all-in-one AI creative platform for generating, editing, and enhancing images and videos using advanced artificial intelligence models.

name: How to Create AI Background Explosion Videos

step.name: Upload Your Image
step.text: Upload a clear image with a visible subject and background space.

step.name: Apply the Explosion Effect
step.text: AI adds realistic fire, debris, and cinematic blast animation behind you.

step.name: Download Your Video
step.text: Preview your action scene and download the explosion video instantly.

mainEntity.name: What is the AI Background Explosion video generator?

acceptedAnswer.text: It is an AI tool that adds a cinematic explosion behind the subject in your photo to create an action video.

mainEntity.name: What type of photo works best?

acceptedAnswer.text: Images with clear subjects and some background space give the best explosion results
Yes. The AI generates fire, smoke, and debris effects to simulate real explosions.

mainEntity.name: Can I control the intensity of the explosion?

acceptedAnswer.text: Some tools allow prompts to adjust size, fire intensity, and style of the explosion.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to generate the video?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most explosion videos are created within seconds to a few minutes after uploading.
